result.stdout:
trtree
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trtree

## Summary

Print a parse tree in a human-readable format

## Description

Reads a tree from stdin and prints the tree as an indented node list.

## Usage

    trtree

## Examples

    trparse A.g4 | trtree

## Current version

0.23.43 Fixes to trgen templates.

## License

The MIT License

Copyright (c) 2025 Ken Domino

Permission is hereby granted, free of charge,

ANY CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT,
TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE
SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.


  -d, --display-source    Display the name of the source for the tree so it can
                          be easily identified.
  -f, --file              Read parse tree data from file instead of stdin.
  -v, --verbose           
  -a, --antlr-style       Output tree as Antlr ToStringTree() style.
  -i, --indent-style      Output tree as plain indented style.
  --paren-indent-style    Output tree as parenthesized indented style.
  -b, --block-style       Output tree as block style.
  --version               
  --help                  Display this help screen.
  --version               Display version information.
